title: Who Is Mojtaba Khamenei, the Son and Possible Successor of Iran’s Supreme Leader?
summary_full: The selection of the son of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in a strike on his compound on Saturday, could anger Iranians seeking change.
